---
title: "American Society of Microbiology – <span class='home-title-second-line'>Texas Medical Center Chapter</span>"
description: "Connecting microbiologists across the Texas Medical Center"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-banner">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <h1 class="hero-title">ASM-TMC Chapter</h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Advancing the Microbiological Sciences in the Texas Medical Center</p>
    <a href="about/index.html" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg me-2">Learn About Us</a>
    <a href="events/index.html" class="btn btn-outline-light btn-lg">Upcoming Events</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Our Mission

The **American Society of Microbiology – Texas Medical Center (ASM-TMC) Chapter** brings together students, postdoctoral researchers, faculty, and industry professionals working in the microbiological sciences across the greater Houston / TMC area.

Our chapter is dedicated to:

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<div class="feature-card text-center">
### 🔬 Scientific Excellence
Hosting seminars, symposia, and workshops that highlight cutting-edge research in microbiology, infectious disease, and related fields.
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<div class="feature-card text-center">
### 🤝 Community Building
Fostering a supportive network that connects early-career scientists with mentors, collaborators, and career opportunities throughout the TMC.
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<div class="feature-card text-center">
### 🎓 Career Development
Providing professional-development resources—grant writing, science communication, career panels—to help members thrive at every stage of their careers.
</div>
:::

:::

---

## Upcoming Events

Stay tuned for our next seminar, networking mixer, and annual symposium. Visit the [Events page](events/index.qmd) for the full calendar and event details.

```{=html}
<script src="events/fullcalendar/index.global.min.js"></script>

<div class="home-events-stack">
  <div id="homepage-next-event"></div>
  <div class="home-calendar-card">
    <div class="fc-legend mb-2">
      <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#003087;"></span> Symposium &nbsp;
      <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#0054a6;"></span> Seminar &nbsp;
      <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#e8740c;"></span> Networking &nbsp;
      <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#2e7d32;"></span> Workshop &nbsp;
      <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#7c3aed;"></span> Conference &nbsp;
      <span class="fc-legend-dot" style="background:#c084fc;"></span> Abstract Deadline
    </div>
    <div id="homepage-event-calendar"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<script src="events/asm-events.js"></script>
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const events = Array.isArray(window.ASM_EVENTS) ? window.ASM_EVENTS : [];
  const nextContainer = document.getElementById('homepage-next-event');
  const calendarElement = document.getElementById('homepage-event-calendar');
  if (!nextContainer || !calendarElement) return;

  const escapeHtml = (value) => String(value ?? '')
    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
    .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
    .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
  const formatDate = (start) => new Date(start + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString(
    'en-US',
    { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }
  );

  const upcoming = events
    .filter((event) => event.isUpcoming)
    .sort((a, b) => new Date(a.start) - new Date(b.start));

  if (window.FullCalendar && calendarElement) {
    const calendar = new FullCalendar.Calendar(calendarElement, {
      initialView: 'dayGridMonth',
      headerToolbar: {
        left: 'prev,next today',
        center: 'title',
        right: 'dayGridMonth,listYear'
      },
      height: 'auto',
      events,
      eventClick: (info) => {
        const url = info.event.url;
        if (url) {
          info.jsEvent.preventDefault();
          window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer');
        } else {
          const props = info.event.extendedProps;
          const message = info.event.title
            + (props.location ? '\n📍 ' + props.location : '')
            + (props.description ? '\n📝 ' + props.description : '');
          alert(message);
        }
      },
      eventMouseEnter: (info) => {
        info.el.title = info.event.extendedProps.description || '';
        info.el.style.cursor = 'pointer';
      }
    });
    calendar.render();
  } else {
    calendarElement.innerHTML = '<p class="text-muted">Unable to load the embedded calendar. Visit the <a href="events/">Events page</a> for the full calendar.</p>';
  }

  if (!upcoming.length) {
    nextContainer.innerHTML = '<p class="text-muted">No upcoming events scheduled at this time. Check back soon!</p>';
    return;
  }

  const nextEvent = upcoming[0];
  const nextProps = nextEvent.extendedProps || {};

  nextContainer.innerHTML =
    '<div class="home-next-event">'
    + '<h3><a href="#homepage-event-calendar">🚩 📅 Next Event</a></h3>'
    + '<p><strong>' + escapeHtml(nextEvent.title) + '</strong>'
    + (nextProps.description ? ' — <em>' + escapeHtml(nextProps.description) + '</em>' : '')
    + '<br>🗓 <strong>Date:</strong> ' + formatDate(nextEvent.start)
    + '<br>📍 <strong>Location:</strong> ' + escapeHtml(nextProps.location || 'TBD')
    + '</p></div>';
});
</script>
```

---

## Podcasts

Stay current with the latest in microbiology and infectious disease through these podcasts:

::: {.podcast-grid}

::: {.podcast-card}
### Editors in Conversation — ASM Podcast

Listen to the latest episodes of ASM's *Editors in Conversation*, where journal editors discuss cutting-edge microbiology research:

<iframe style="border-radius:12px" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/show/4OuP4z0aWTTTbqnVCVSDGl?utm_source=generator" width="100%" height="152" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

::: {.podcast-card}
### SIDP Breakpoints

The official podcast of the Society of Infectious Diseases Pharmacists (SIDP), covering antimicrobial stewardship and infectious diseases pharmacy:

<iframe style="border-radius:12px" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/show/1D79kHPArirj7kVhQUBBCE?utm_source=generator" width="100%" height="152" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

::: {.podcast-card}
### IDSA Let's Talk ID

The Infectious Diseases Society of America's podcast featuring expert discussions on infectious disease topics:

<iframe style="border-radius:12px" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/show/6nMGZTc5BYJ1Yj5bYnxvNU?utm_source=generator" width="100%" height="152" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

::: {.podcast-card}
### MicrobeTV Puscast

MicrobeTV's weekly podcast summarizing the latest research in infectious disease:

<iframe style="border-radius:12px" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/show/66C9Cul1toQ643HVjFMUH3?utm_source=generator" width="100%" height="152" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

::: {.podcast-card}
### The Lancet Infectious Diseases

Podcast from *The Lancet Infectious Diseases* journal covering infectious disease research and policy:

<iframe style="border-radius:12px" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/show/78uAfdHWOza6UD54zLkK5X?utm_source=generator" width="100%" height="152" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

::: {.podcast-card}
### The Lancet Microbe

Podcast from *The Lancet Microbe* journal exploring cutting-edge microbiology and infectious disease science:

<iframe style="border-radius:12px" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/show/7ziyiBB9HIUZMZWjXjBGH3?utm_source=generator" width="100%" height="152" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

::: {.podcast-card}
### ESCMID CMI Comms

Podcast from the European Society of Clinical Microbiology and Infectious Diseases covering clinical microbiology communications:

<iframe style="border-radius:12px" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/show/4GFyrCmRyrkByGhz0Y2bEp?utm_source=generator" width="100%" height="152" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

::: {.podcast-card}
### Microbiology Society

Podcast from the Microbiology Society featuring interviews and discussions on microbiology research:

<iframe style="border-radius:12px" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/show/4kbFszOnT2OLWT3mfKovS1?utm_source=generator" width="100%" height="152" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::

:::

---

## Why Join ASM-TMC?

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
- 🌐 Access to a **national network** of 30,000+ ASM members worldwide
- 📅 Invitations to **exclusive chapter events** — seminars, socials, workshops
- 💼 **Career resources** including job boards and mentorship programs
- 📰 Discounted access to **ASM journals** and publications
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
- 🏆 Eligibility for **ASM grants and awards** for students and postdocs
- 🗣️ Opportunities to **present your research** at chapter and national meetings
- 🤝 **Volunteer leadership** roles to build your CV and expand your network
- 📧 Chapter **newsletter** with local news and opportunities
:::

:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## Ready to Get Involved?
Membership in the ASM-TMC Chapter is open to anyone interested in the microbiological sciences. Join today at [asm.org/membership](https://asm.org/membership) and connect with us via our mailing list.
:::

---

## About the Texas Medical Center

The [Texas Medical Center](https://www.tmc.edu/) is the largest medical complex in the world, home to 60+ institutions including research universities, hospitals, and biotech companies. The TMC is a hub for infectious disease, translational, and basic science research — making it an ideal home for a vibrant ASM chapter.

---

## Connect With Us

Have questions or want to get involved? Visit the [About page](about/index.qmd) to meet our leadership team and learn how to reach us.

---

## Social Media

Follow us to stay up to date with ASM-TMC news, events, and announcements.

```{=html}
<div class="social-feeds-grid">
  <!-- X (Twitter) follow card -->
  <div class="social-feed-card">
    <div class="social-feed-header">
      <i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i>
      <span>@asm_tmc on X</span>
    </div>
    <div class="social-follow-wrapper">
      <p class="social-feed-desc">
        Follow us on X (formerly Twitter) for real-time updates, event announcements, and microbiology news from the Texas Medical Center community.
      </p>
      <a href="https://x.com/asm_tmc"
         target="_blank"
         rel="noopener noreferrer"
         class="btn btn-dark">
        <i class="bi bi-twitter-x me-2"></i>Follow @asm_tmc
      </a>
      <hr class="social-divider">
      <p class="social-feed-note">
        <i class="bi bi-bell me-1"></i>
        Turn on notifications so you never miss an event announcement or research spotlight.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Instagram follow card -->
  <div class="social-feed-card">
    <div class="social-feed-header">
      <i class="bi bi-instagram"></i>
      <span>@asm_tmc on Instagram</span>
    </div>
    <div class="social-follow-wrapper">
      <p class="social-feed-desc">
        Follow us on Instagram for behind-the-scenes photos, event highlights, and microbiology content from the Texas Medical Center community.
      </p>
      <a href="https://instagram.com/asm_tmc"
         target="_blank"
         rel="noopener noreferrer"
         class="btn btn-instagram">
        <i class="bi bi-instagram me-2"></i>Follow @asm_tmc
      </a>
      <hr class="social-divider">
      <p class="social-feed-note">
        <i class="bi bi-bell me-1"></i>
        Turn on post notifications so you never miss an event announcement or research spotlight.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Facebook follow card -->
  <div class="social-feed-card">
    <div class="social-feed-header">
      <i class="bi bi-facebook"></i>
      <span>ASM-TMC on Facebook</span>
    </div>
    <div class="social-follow-wrapper">
      <p class="social-feed-desc">
        Like our Facebook page to stay informed about chapter events, announcements, and news from the broader ASM community.
      </p>
      <a href="https://www.facebook.com/asm.tmc.chapter"
         target="_blank"
         rel="noopener noreferrer"
         class="btn btn-facebook">
        <i class="bi bi-facebook me-2"></i>Like our Page
      </a>
      <hr class="social-divider">
      <p class="social-feed-note">
        <i class="bi bi-bell me-1"></i>
        Turn on notifications so you never miss an event announcement.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- LinkedIn follow card -->
  <div class="social-feed-card">
    <div class="social-feed-header">
      <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
      <span>ASM-TMC on LinkedIn</span>
    </div>
    <div class="social-follow-wrapper">
      <p class="social-feed-desc">
        Follow our LinkedIn page for professional updates, career opportunities, and networking with microbiologists across the Texas Medical Center.
      </p>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/asm-tmc"
         target="_blank"
         rel="noopener noreferrer"
         class="btn btn-linkedin">
        <i class="bi bi-linkedin me-2"></i>Follow on LinkedIn
      </a>
      <hr class="social-divider">
      <p class="social-feed-note">
        <i class="bi bi-briefcase me-1"></i>
        Connect with fellow microbiologists and discover new career opportunities.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
